title: sesamum calycinum
intro: Sesamum calycinum, also known as Egyptian starflower, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sesamum calycinum include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Sesamum calycinum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
